subcodes.first_line: O ye two steadfast ones in the Covenant! Your letter hath arrived, and the detailed account of the martyrdom of Siráju'sh-Shuhadá, Áqá Mírzá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو ثابت بر پیمان مکتوب شما رسید و تفصیل شهادت سراج الشهداء آقا میرزا
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @visitation Tablets, @martyrs and martyrdom, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
